backend/main.mo: Motoko actor for the Coal & Curry backend, managing reservations, newsletter subscribers, and reviews with CRUD operations and sorting logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three SEO-related features (index.html meta tags, per-page SEOHead usage, robots.txt/sitemap updates) to their affected files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React pages, components, and public assets.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA with full SEO metadata including title, description, keywords, canonical link, Open Graph tags, Twitter Card tags, and geo/local SEO meta tags for Coal & Curry restaurant.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all crawlers on public pages while disallowing /cart and /checkout, and pointing to the canonical sitemap URL.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing all 9 public pages of coalandcurry.com with canonical URLs, lastmod dates of 2026-03-01, change frequencies, and priorities.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with 11 routes, wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and CartProvider, and renders the shared Layout with Navbar, Footer, and floating buttons.
frontend/src/components/chatbot/ChatbotP: Renders the chat UI panel for the 'Agni' restaurant assistant, handling message state, bot responses, quick reply buttons, and a text input form.
frontend/src/components/chatbot/ChatbotW: Floating toggle button fixed to the bottom-right corner that shows or hides the ChatbotPanel.
frontend/src/components/gallery/Lightbox: Full-screen image lightbox overlay with keyboard navigation (Escape, arrow keys) and prev/next buttons for browsing a list of images.
frontend/src/components/home/CustomerRev: Carousel-style testimonials section that fetches top reviews from the backend actor (falling back to static data) and displays three at a time with star ratings.
frontend/src/components/home/HeroSection: Full-screen hero section with a background image, restaurant title, tagline, CTA buttons linking to the menu and reservation pages, and summary stats.
frontend/src/components/home/InstagramFe: Displays a 6-image Instagram-style grid linking to the restaurant's Instagram profile, with hover overlay effects.
frontend/src/components/home/OffersGalle: Promotional section showing three hardcoded limited-time offers (Lunch Combo, Family Feast, Weekend Grill Fest) over a background image, with a link to the full offers page.
frontend/src/components/home/SignatureDi: Grid of four signature menu items filtered from menuData, each showing an image, veg/non-veg badge, spice level, and an add-to-cart button.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingR: Fixed floating button in the bottom-right area that links to the reservation page.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingW: Renders a fixed floating WhatsApp button in the bottom-left corner with a pulsing animation and a hover tooltip that links to a WhatsApp chat.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Renders the site footer with brand info, social links, quick navigation links, menu categories, contact details, and a newsletter signup section.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navbar.ts: Renders a fixed top navigation bar with logo, desktop nav links, a cart icon with item count badge, a 'Book Table' CTA, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/layout/Newslette: Provides an email newsletter subscription form that calls a mutation hook and displays success, duplicate, or error feedback states.
frontend/src/components/menu/DishCard.ts: Displays a menu item card with image, veg/non-veg badge, signature label, spice level indicator, price, and an add-to-cart or quantity adjustment control.
frontend/src/components/menu/MenuTabs.ts: Renders a sticky horizontal scrollable tab bar for filtering menu items by category, including an 'All Items' tab derived from menuData categories.
frontend/src/components/offers/Countdown: Displays a live countdown timer to a target date, updating every second and showing days, hours, minutes, and seconds in styled boxes.
frontend/src/components/seo/SEOHead.tsx: Imperatively sets document title, meta tags (description, robots, Open Graph, Twitter Card), canonical link, and an optional JSON-LD script via useEffect.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: Provides a React context for cart state with localStorage persistence, exposing add, remove, update quantity, and clear actions along with total item count and subtotal.
frontend/src/context/LanguageContext.tsx: Provides a React context for toggling between English and Tamil languages, exposing a translation function `t` and `toggleLanguage` for switching locales.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: Manages shopping cart state with add, remove, update, and clear operations, persisting cart items to localStorage and exposing cart count and total.
frontend/src/data/menuData.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and static data for menu items and categories, covering veg starters, coal specials, biryani, dosa, and beverages with pricing and metadata.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context using DFINITY's AuthClient, providing login, logout, and identity state with a React provider and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching reviews, submitting reviews and reservations, subscribing to the newsletter, and retrieving all reservations via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global styles, Tailwind directives, and a premium dark theme with custom CSS tokens for coal, ember, and gold color palettes, plus utility classes and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Renders the About Us page for Coal & Curry, displaying the restaurant's story, founder/chef profiles, and hygiene certifications with SEO metadata.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Renders a blog listing page with six hardcoded posts about Chettinad cuisine, coal-fire cooking, and Tamil food culture, each tagged with a color-coded category badge.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Displays the shopping cart with item list, quantity controls, remove buttons, and an order summary linking to checkout, using the CartContext for state.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Implements a multi-step checkout flow (order type → details → payment → confirmation) with simulated payment processing and cart clearing on completion.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Renders the Contact page with business hours, contact details (phone, email, address), social media links, a WhatsApp link, and a simple contact form with submission state.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Gallery page displaying four sectioned image grids (charcoal cooking, interiors, food photography, celebrations) with a lightbox component for per-section image navigation and SEO metadata.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page composing the hero section, features strip, signature dishes, about teaser, and quick-info blocks with restaurant JSON-LD schema and SEO head.
frontend/src/pages/Loyalty.tsx: Loyalty program page showing four benefit cards, four point-based tiers (Coal to Inferno), and a phone-number enrollment form with basic validation.
frontend/src/pages/Menu.tsx: Menu page with category tab filtering, live search input, and a responsive dish grid rendered via DishCard components sourced from menuData.
frontend/src/pages/Offers.tsx: Offers page listing six time-limited promotional deals (lunch combo, family feast, etc.) in a card grid with countdown timers and a hero banner image.
frontend/src/pages/Reservation.tsx: Table reservation page with a validated form (name, phone, date, time, guests, occasion, seating) that submits via a React Query mutation and shows a confirmation screen on success.
frontend/src/utils/chatbotResponses.ts: Defines keyword-based chatbot response strings for a South Indian restaurant covering topics like menu, timings, reservations, delivery, specialties, and payment. Also exports a list of quick-reply button labels.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Coal & Curry project, extending the theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Lato), a restaurant-specific color palette (coal, ember, gold, saffron), custom border radii, and keyframe animations like ember-glow, fade-in-up, and whatsapp-pulse.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Coal & Curry restaurant website project at version 3, recording existing SEO-related features (meta tags, SEOHead component, robots.txt/sitemap updates) and a pending feature request to add SEO tags for better Google discoverability.
